competencies.name: Advise Level 2
competencies.description: Organize processes and information for new software: adapt to changes, select from limited approaches, tailor solutions to constraints.

deliverables.title: Project Documentation Package
deliverables.subtitle: Created comprehensive project documentation including detailed requirements analysis, UML design specifications, API documentation, and implementation guidelines for a React-based web application serving 10,000+ users

deliverables.title: Architecture Migration Plan
deliverables.subtitle: Successfully adapted project scope from monolithic architecture to microservices approach in response to changing stakeholder requirements, reducing deployment time by 60% for a distributed team of 8 developers

deliverables.title: Methodology Selection Report
deliverables.subtitle: Evaluated and selected Scrum methodology over Waterfall approach for a 12-month software development project, resulting in 40% faster feature delivery and improved team velocity from 20 to 35 story points per sprint

deliverables.title: CI/CD Pipeline Design Document
deliverables.subtitle: Developed customized CI/CD pipeline solution using Jenkins and Docker for a budget-constrained startup project, achieving 95% test automation coverage while staying within €50K infrastructure budget

competencies.name: Analysis Level 2
competencies.description: Analyze software development processes and products in varied environments. Solve problems creatively using basic and advanced concepts independently.

deliverables.title: Performance Analysis Report
deliverables.subtitle: Conducted thorough analysis of Node.js microservices architecture in a cloud-native environment, identifying performance bottlenecks that were causing 45% slower response times during peak hours

deliverables.title: Optimization Solution Document
deliverables.subtitle: Applied creative problem-solving techniques using design patterns and algorithmic optimization to resolve memory leak issues in a Python data processing application, reducing memory usage by 70%

deliverables.title: Code Refactoring Plan
deliverables.subtitle: Demonstrated independent application of fundamental software development concepts by implementing SOLID principles in a legacy C# codebase, improving maintainability and reducing bug introduction rate by 35%

deliverables.title: System Architecture Review
deliverables.subtitle: Utilized advanced analytical concepts including complexity theory and performance profiling to evaluate a distributed system handling 1M+ daily transactions, identifying optimization opportunities worth €200K in annual savings

competencies.name: Design Level 2
competencies.description: Create software that integrates into ICT systems, meets specific requirements, and can be easily incorporated post-delivery. Deal with unpredictability using a limited range of approaches to design efficiently.

deliverables.title: REST API Design Specification
deliverables.subtitle: Designed and developed a RESTful API using Spring Boot that seamlessly integrates with existing SAP ERP systems and third-party payment gateways, handling 500K transactions daily with 99.9% uptime

deliverables.title: System Architecture Diagram
deliverables.subtitle: Created software architecture using Domain-Driven Design principles that meets GDPR compliance requirements and supports multi-tenant SaaS model for 50+ enterprise clients

deliverables.title: Microservices Deployment Strategy
deliverables.subtitle: Developed flexible microservices architecture using Kubernetes that accommodates unpredictable scaling requirements, auto-scaling from 3 to 50 pods during peak traffic periods

deliverables.title: Component Integration Guide
deliverables.subtitle: Produced modular component design using TypeScript and React that enables plug-and-play integration, reducing new feature implementation time from 2 weeks to 3 days

competencies.name: Manage&Control Level 2
competencies.description: Oversee software development, improve performance, and ensure compatibility with existing systems. Deal with uncertainties when needed.

deliverables.title: Project Management Plan
deliverables.subtitle: Established and maintained oversight of Agile software development lifecycle for a 15-person cross-functional team, ensuring 95% on-time delivery rate across 24 quarterly releases

deliverables.title: Performance Monitoring Dashboard
deliverables.subtitle: Implemented performance monitoring using New Relic and Grafana dashboards, identifying and resolving database query optimization issues that improved application response time from 3.2s to 0.8s

deliverables.title: System Integration Strategy
deliverables.subtitle: Ensured software compatibility with legacy Oracle databases through comprehensive integration testing and data migration strategies, achieving zero data loss during system cutover

deliverables.title: Business Continuity Plan
deliverables.subtitle: Developed contingency plans and risk mitigation strategies for a critical healthcare system, including automated failover mechanisms that maintained 99.99% availability during infrastructure outages

competencies.name: Realise Level 2
competencies.description: Develop and test software components according to specifications, address requirements, handle unpredictability, integrate smoothly with existing ICT infrastructure, select methods to resolve issues.

deliverables.title: Authentication Service Implementation
deliverables.subtitle: Developed and implemented user authentication microservice using JWT tokens and OAuth 2.0 according to detailed technical specifications, supporting 50K concurrent users with sub-200ms response times

deliverables.title: Testing Strategy Document
deliverables.subtitle: Executed comprehensive testing protocols including 95% unit test coverage with Jest, integration testing with Postman, and end-to-end testing with Cypress, achieving zero critical bugs in production

deliverables.title: Feature Flag Implementation Plan
deliverables.subtitle: Implemented adaptive development strategies using feature flags and A/B testing frameworks to accommodate changing requirements, enabling 40% faster feature rollout cycles

deliverables.title: Real-time Data Synchronization Module
deliverables.subtitle: Achieved seamless integration of React frontend with GraphQL API and PostgreSQL database, implementing real-time data synchronization for a collaborative document editing platform

competencies.name: Personal & Professional Development
competencies.description: Know your strengths and weaknesses in ICT and personal growth. Act according to your values to improve and learn continuously.

deliverables.title: Skills Assessment Matrix
deliverables.subtitle: Conducted comprehensive self-assessment using 360-degree feedback and skills matrix analysis, identifying proficiency gaps in cloud architecture (AWS) and container orchestration (Kubernetes) requiring focused development

deliverables.title: Mentorship Program Proposal
deliverables.subtitle: Demonstrated consistent alignment with professional values by mentoring junior developers and advocating for ethical AI practices, leading to company-wide adoption of responsible ML guidelines

deliverables.title: Professional Development Roadmap
deliverables.subtitle: Implemented continuous learning through completion of 15 online courses and 3 certifications (AWS Solutions Architect, Scrum Master), applying new knowledge to improve team processes and reduce deployment failures by 60%

deliverables.title: Git Workflow Optimization Guide
deliverables.subtitle: Acquired and applied advanced Git workflow skills and CI/CD pipeline expertise, enabling team transition from manual deployments to automated pipelines that reduced release cycles from 2 weeks to 2 days

competencies.name: Professional Methods & Ethics
competencies.description: Use professional methods to set goals, involve stakeholders, conduct research, provide advice, make decisions, and deliver reports ethically and sustainably, both individually and in teams.

deliverables.title: Professional Development Goals Document
deliverables.subtitle: Established SMART goals for professional development including "Achieve AWS DevOps Professional certification within 6 months" and "Lead 3 knowledge-sharing sessions quarterly," tracking progress through bi-weekly reviews

deliverables.title: Stakeholder Communication Plan
deliverables.subtitle: Facilitated stakeholder engagement through weekly standup meetings and monthly business reviews with product owners, resulting in 85% stakeholder satisfaction score and 30% reduction in requirement changes

deliverables.title: Data Privacy Implementation Guide
deliverables.subtitle: Conducted GDPR compliance research and implemented data anonymization techniques using differential privacy algorithms, ensuring ethical data handling for a user base of 500K+ individuals

deliverables.title: Sustainability Impact Assessment
deliverables.subtitle: Produced comprehensive sustainability report analyzing carbon footprint of cloud infrastructure choices, recommending migration to green data centers that reduced environmental impact by 40% while maintaining performance
